Theme Comparison

Cedar (Dark)
Zen (Light)

Capabilities

Everything your best friend can't do. 19 superhuman capabilities that demonstrate the "Better than Human" promise.

The Promise

"We believe in making AI human, and the decisions we make will reflect that."

Ferni Core Philosophy

Ferni doesn't try to replace human relationships. Instead, it offers capabilities that complement human connection - things that are hard for even the best friends to do consistently.

Core Capabilities

The Mirror

Ferni

Pattern recognition across conversations. Shows you your own behavior objectively, without judgment.

Habit Intelligence

Maya

Tracks habits with perfect consistency. Never forgets to check in. Adjusts based on Four Tendencies.

Financial Clarity

Peter

Unemotional financial guidance. Helps you see spending patterns and wealth-building opportunities.

Milestone Tracking

Jordan

Never forgets important dates. Helps plan celebrations and remembers what matters to you.

Calendar Intelligence

Alex

Understands your energy patterns. Protects deep work time. Suggests optimal scheduling.

Life Wisdom

Nayan

Synthesis across all conversations. Helps you see the bigger picture of your life journey.

Superhuman Services

These 10 services go beyond conversation - they're proactive capabilities that work for you.

01

Commitment Keeper

Tracks every promise you make. Friends forget - Ferni never does.

02

Predictive Coaching

Sees patterns before you do. Catches slips before they become slides.

03

Life Narrative

Maintains your story across time. Connects past decisions to present choices.

04

Values Alignment

Gentle accountability to your stated values. No judgment, just clarity.

05

Emotional First Aid

Available instantly at 2am. No burden on anyone else.

06

Relationship Network

Remembers everyone important to you. Tracks connection health.

07

Capacity Guardian

Detects burnout signals early. Protects your energy before it's too late.

08

Dream Keeper

Holds your aspirations sacred. Reminds you of buried dreams.

09

Relationship Milestones

Tracks anniversaries, growth moments, shared experiences.

10

Seasonal Awareness

Understands your annual patterns. Prepares you for known challenges.

Design Principles

Every capability follows these principles:

Complement, Don't Replace

Enhance human relationships, never substitute for them.

Proactive, Not Intrusive

Surface insights at the right moment, not constantly.

Gentle, Not Preachy

Observations without judgment. Support without lectures.

Consistent, Not Rigid

Reliable presence that adapts to your changing needs.
